text: Dr. Awanti's approach towards treating a patient is what actually stands out. Instead of simply rushing to the remedy, she understands the medical issue and the background of the patient along with the associated factors and then starts the treatment. I had consulted her for my mother to seek help on some urine related issue which had been bothering her for more than 2 years. Upon starting the medication from Dr. Awanti, my mother started experiencing relief from Day 1. Over period of next 2 months, my mother now has a major relief. We are thankful to Dr. Awanti, she could do wonders where even the other remedies didn't work out to be beneficial.

Dr. Awanti Dhadphale has been an absolute blessing for me and my family. We have been under her homeopathic care for the past couple of years, and the results have been truly remarkable. From old gut-related concerns, chronic joints pain to managing diabetes and overall health & well-being, her treatment has worked wonders for all of us. What sets Dr. Awanti apart is her exceptionally accurate diagnosis and deep understanding of her patients' concerns. She listens patiently, observes keenly, and addresses the root cause rather than just the symptoms. Her medicines have been highly effective and gentle, bringing long-term relief and balance. She is not only immensely intelligent and knowledgeable but also deeply empathetic in her approach. Her ability to connect with patients and make them feel heard and understood is rare and reassuring. Additionally, her psychological consultations are equally commendable - she offers thoughtful guidance with great clarity and compassion. Dr. Awanti truly combines medical expertise with genuine care, making every consultation a comforting and healing experience. I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone seeking holistic, effective, and empathetic homeopathic treatment.

I was suffering from acidity a few months back. I went Dr. Awanti and she gave me a diet plan which helped me a lot. The plan she gave was with minimal changes and hence was very easy to follow. With her diet plan and Homeopathic medicine, I could beat my acidity issue. I also lost 7 kgs weight, so I am still following the diet plan.. I am grateful to Dr. Awanti for her guidance.

Thanks Dr Awanti for your miraculous treatment.

Great experience with Dr. Awanti! Her treatment for my acidity and weakness worked wonders. She is professional, easy to talk to, and her remedies are very effective. If you are looking for a reliable homeopathic doctor, she is the one to see. Thank you Dr. Awanti!

Dr.Awanti is incredibly good. I have been visiting her for more than a month now and I clearly see visible results. She always prescribes medicines only after getting to know you well so they work well with your body and you can see clear progress as you use them consistently. There is an answer to every question in the world. (Every problem has a solution) This saying is prevalent. Similarly, the answer to any question / problem in the human body is Dr. Avanti. After going to him, he understands the complete history of the patient and only then does he give medicines. Be it physical or mental problems, or old diseases like diabetes, B. P. Along with medicine, the doctor also counsels the patient well to get rid of that disease. He has achieved great proficiency as a counselor. The secret of his success is to understand the patient completely and administer medicine. Best wishes for the future!!!

Awanti is best at her work. I approach her first time for my daughter and got really good result. I am consulting her since then for all kind of medical concern in my house & for all my family members. I highly recommend her for all types of Homeopathic treatment.

I went to Dr. Awanti for Varicose veins got excellent results within a month. I highly recommend her for all types of treatment. She is a great counsellor and listener as well, helped me in boosting confidence and eliminating low self esteem in the due course of treatment.
